title: CF Worker VLESS Node Setup
metaDescription: Easily deploy VLESS nodes on Cloudflare Workers with this tool.

header.accountInfoPlaceholder: Account information and selector will be displayed here.

apiKeyModal.title: View Cloudflare Global API Key
apiKeyModal.instructions1: 1. Log in to your Cloudflare account.
apiKeyModal.instructions3: 3. Find the 'Global API Key' and click 'View' to copy it.

footer.copyright: © {{year}} CF Worker GUI. All rights reserved.

workerForm.workerNameTooltip: Optional: A custom name for your Cloudflare Worker. If empty, a random name will be generated.
workerForm.uuidTooltip: Optional: A valid UUID (v4). If empty, a random UUID will be generated.
workerForm.nodeNameTooltip: Optional: A custom name for the VLESS node. If empty, it will be derived from the Worker Name.
workerForm.socks5RelayTooltip: Enable SOCKS5 relay for the worker.
workerForm.proxyIpTooltip: Optional: Specify preferred proxy IPs, comma-separated.
workerForm.proxyIpPlaceholderDisabled: Disabled due to SOCKS5 Proxy input
workerForm.socks5ProxyTooltip: Optional: Specify a SOCKS5 proxy (e.g., user:pass@host:port).
workerForm.socks5ProxyPlaceholderDisabled: Disabled due to Proxy IP input
workerForm.customDomainTooltip: Optional: Bind the worker to a custom domain (requires Cloudflare setup).

ipModal.title: Select Proxy IP Country
ipModal.description: Select a country to fetch available proxy IPs. Max IPs: {{count}}.
ipModal.noCountriesFound: No countries found or unable to fetch data.
